Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Plaintiffs Benjamin Dale Hoffer, Susan Johnson, and Cathy Planovsly.
Plailntiff Benjamin Dale Hoffer did not appear. Plaintiff Susan Johnson appeared via CourtCall. Plaintiff Cathy Planovsky did not appear.
Nominal Defendant Irene Hoffer did not appear.
The court having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, borth oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, IT IS ORDERED THAT:
The following are entitled to distribution of all net funds derived from the wrongful death cause of action resulting from settlements negotiated after the January 5, 2010 death of BENJAMIN HOFFER, in the following proportions:
BENJAMIN DALE HOFFER as Wrongful Death Heir 33.34%

CATHY PLANOVSKY as Wrongful Death Heir 33.33%
IRENE HOFFER as Wrongful Death Heir 0.00%
for a Total of 100.00%
Brayton and Purcell LLP shall recover from the net settlement funds that may come into the possession of Brayton & Purcell LLP's the sum of $2,904.80 as reasonable attorneys' fees and costs.
